ask.title: Ask
ask.voiceQuestionDesc: Speak your question. Stop recording to answer.
ask.placeholder: Type a question, or use the capsule above.

errors.stt_timeout: Speech recognition timed out. Please try again.
errors.stt_invalid_key: Cloud speech access failed. Please sign in again or check your API key.
errors.stt_quota_exceeded: Cloud speech quota exceeded. Upgrade to Pro or switch to BYOK mode.
errors.stt_no_speech_detected: No speech detected. Please try again.
errors.output_fallback_clipboard: Text output failed. The result was copied to clipboard instead. {{details}}
errors.output_wayland_unsupported: Keyboard output is not supported on Wayland. The result was copied to clipboard instead.
errors.accessibility_required: Accessibility permission is missing. The result was copied to clipboard.
errors.output_streaming_partial: Streaming insert stopped early. The inserted text was kept. {{details}}
errors.llm_failed: AI polishing failed. The original text was output instead. {{details}}
errors.llm_quota_exceeded: Cloud AI quota exceeded. Upgrade to Pro or switch to BYOK mode.
errors.output_wayland_clipboard_copy_only: Copied to clipboard. Paste manually on Wayland.

home.description: Use {{hotkey}} to start voice recording. Your speech will be transcribed and optionally polished by AI.

onboarding.speakToWrite: Speak to write — turn your voice into polished text in real time
onboarding.selectLanguageDesc: Select the language for the app interface. You can change it later in Settings.

test.demoRaw: hello um can you help me with this
test.demoPolished: Hello, can you help me with this?

steps.welcomeSub: Set up OpenTypeless in a few steps
steps.signInSub: Connect your account to get started
steps.chooseModeSub: Select how you want to use OpenTypeless

account.name: Name
account.verificationSent: We sent a verification link to
account.oauthPendingHint: If your browser shows “Load failed”, copy the browser address and use Complete from clipboard below.
account.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

done.title: You're all set!
done.capsuleAppearsWhenRecording: The capsule appears while recording and processing.
done.holdPressSub: Use your hotkey to start and stop recording
done.clickCapsuleSub: When visible, drag it to reposition. Right-click for options.
done.dragToRepositionSub: When visible, drag the capsule anywhere on screen.
done.rightClickMenuSub: Right-click the capsule for more options
done.restoreCapsuleSub: Use the tray or Settings to keep the capsule visible while idle.
done.askAnythingSub: Use the Ask hotkey to record a question; stop to get one answer.
done.accessibilityRequired: Accessibility permission is required for text output

settings.title: Settings
settings.clickToConfirm: Click again to confirm, or press another combination
settings.restoreClipboardTextOnlyHint: Text clipboard only; images, files, and rich content are not fully restored yet.
settings.streamingInsert: Write AI text as it generates
settings.sttSignInHint: Sign in and subscribe to Pro to use official cloud words/month.
settings.sttUpgradeHint: Upgrade to Pro for cloud words/month across 99 languages. No API key needed.
settings.sttProActive: Pro active — millisecond STT, 99 languages. No API key needed.
settings.customSttSetupHint: Start your local OpenAI-compatible STT server first, then test the connection here.
settings.volcengineSttKeyHint: Use a Volcengine Speech API key, or app_id:access_token from the old console. Ark LLM keys are separate.
settings.customSttConnectionFailed: Local STT server is not reachable. Check that it is running and the port is correct.
settings.llmSignInHint: Sign in and subscribe to Pro to use official cloud words/month.
settings.llmUpgradeHint: Upgrade to Pro for instant AI rewriting with cloud words/month. No API key needed.
settings.llmProActive: Pro active — instant AI rewriting. No API key needed.
settings.storedLocally: Stored locally on your device. Never sent to OpenTypeless servers.
settings.credentialSaveFailed: Could not save API key to OS vault. {{details}}
settings.modelBestEffort: Context and thought-aware support is best effort
settings.enableAiPolishDesc: Cleans up fillers, punctuation, and wording before output. Turn off to output raw transcription.
settings.contextAdaptation: Adapt writing to the current app
settings.contextAdaptationHint: Uses a private local app category to shape the writing style.
settings.askAnythingDesc: Voice question, one-shot answer. No chat history.
settings.translationModeDesc: Translates each dictation result into the target language below.
settings.selectedTextContextDesc: Lets Ask and polish summarize, rewrite, or translate selected text. Uses more AI tokens.
settings.aboutDescription: Open-source AI voice input tool. Speak to write — turn your voice into polished text in real time.
settings.historyPrivacyHint: Set days to 0 to keep history by count only. History stays local.
settings.accessibilityRequired: Required for Fn shortcut or keyboard output
settings.waylandHotkeyLimited: Global hotkeys are limited on Wayland. Use the tray or app button if this shortcut does not respond.
settings.hotkeyRegistrationFailed: Shortcut could not be registered in this session.
settings.hotkeyConflict: Dictation and Ask shortcuts cannot be the same.
settings.hotkeyInvalid: One shortcut is invalid. Record a new key combination.
settings.waylandClipboardCopyOnly: On Wayland, clipboard mode copies text only. Paste manually to avoid system permission prompts.
settings.advancedPolishSettingsDesc: Optional writing rules for AI polish
settings.customPolishInstructionsPlaceholder: Optional: keep a concise tone, preserve domain terms, or follow your team style.

dictionary.noEntries: No entries yet. Add proper nouns to improve recognition accuracy.

scenes.signInToBrowse: Sign in to browse scene packs.
scenes.upgradeToUse: Upgrade to Pro to use this scene pack.
scenes.noCustomScenesDesc: Create a local scene to save a reusable AI polish prompt.
scenes.noCloudPacks: No cloud scene packs available yet. You can still create local custom scenes above.

cleanDictation.name: Clean Dictation
cleanDictation.description: Lightly clean transcription while preserving meaning.

meetingNotes.name: Meeting Notes
meetingNotes.description: Turn dictation into structured bullets, decisions, and action items.

professionalEmail.name: Professional Email
professionalEmail.description: Rewrite spoken notes into a concise professional email.

supportReply.name: Support Reply
supportReply.description: Turn dictation into a helpful customer support response.

technicalExplanation.name: Technical Explanation
technicalExplanation.description: Organize spoken notes into a clear technical explanation.

codeComment.name: Code Comment
codeComment.description: Write a concise code review comment or engineering note.

productSpecNotes.name: Product Spec Notes
productSpecNotes.description: Shape dictation into goals, requirements, and open questions.

history.title: History
history.noHistoryHint: Press your hotkey to start recording and your transcriptions will appear here.
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This cannot be undone.

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.subtitle: Subscribe monthly for fast voice recognition and AI rewriting with 100,000 cloud words each month.
upgrade.thankYou: Your plan is active — thank you for your support!
upgrade.signInFirst: Sign in from the Account page first to subscribe.

planDescriptions.pro: Flexible monthly access with 100,000 cloud words/month.
planDescriptions.lifetime: Pay once for lifetime access with 100,000 cloud words every month.

benefits.title: What you get
benefits.cloudWords: 100,000 cloud words/month for voice and AI
benefits.llm: Cloud words/month for AI polishing and rewriting
benefits.noApiKey: No API keys required in cloud mode
benefits.backupScenes: Cloud backup and curated scene packs

features.scenesDetail: Curated prompt templates and future scene sync

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Sign in to sync data and manage your subscription
account.name: Name
account.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
account.oauthPendingDesc: Finish signing in with your browser. You'll be redirected back automatically.
account.oauthPendingHint: If your browser shows “Load failed”, copy the browser address and use Complete from clipboard below.
account.oauthTimeout: Sign in timed out. Please try again.
account.sttQuotaWarning: STT usage has exceeded 90% of your monthly quota
account.llmQuotaWarning: LLM usage has exceeded 90% of your monthly quota
account.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send a secure reset link.
account.resetLinkSentDesc: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link is on its way.
account.invalidOrExpiredResetLink: This reset link is invalid or expired
account.sessionExpired: Your cloud session expired. Sign in again.

updates.error: Update failed. Please download the latest version from the website.
